# LaserDisc Archive 1.0

A blank LaserDisc collection archive based on the VHS Archive framework.

## Included

- Blank starter collection
- Browse
- Add LaserDisc
- Photos
- Backup / Import
- Settings
- Music / SFX toggles
- Movie Night / Feature Presentation
- PWA support
- GitHub Pages workflow

## Suggested commit message

Release LaserDisc Archive 1.0
